name: skill-shrinker
description: Shrink bloated Claude Code skill/agent/command files

plugins.name: skill-shrinker
plugins.description: Shrink bloated Claude Code skill/agent/command files: extracts bash logic to scripts/, moves design notes to DESIGN.md, and compresses SKILL.md to ≤220 lines. Supports three modes: full shrink (>500 lines), proposal (200-500 lines), and reject (<200 lines).
